VANILLA: SELECT * FROM cypher('$GRAPHNAME', $$ MATCH (descendant:TreeNode)-[:HAS_CHILD*1..]->(ancestor:TreeNode) WHERE ancestor.string_id = '$rootID' RETURN descendant $$) as (n agtype);
Integer (Range): SELECT * FROM cypher('$GRAPHNAME', $$ MATCH (n:TreeNode) WHERE n.string_id STARTS WITH '$rootID' RETURN n $$) as (n agtype);

VANILLA: SELECT * FROM cypher('$GRAPHNAME', $$ MATCH (leaf:TreeNode)-[:HAS_CHILD*1..]->(root:TreeNode {string_id: '$rootID'}) WHERE NOT EXISTS((leaf)<-[:HAS_CHILD]-()) RETURN leaf $$) as (leaf agtype);
Integer (Range): SELECT * FROM cypher('$GRAPHNAME', $$ MATCH (n:TreeNode) WHERE n.string_id STARTS WITH '$rootID' AND n.height = 0 RETURN n $$) as (n agtype);

VANILLA: SELECT * FROM cypher('$GRAPHNAME', $$ MATCH (descendant:TreeNode)-[:HAS_CHILD*1..]->(ancestor:TreeNode) WHERE ancestor.string_id = '$rootID' RETURN count(descendant) $$) as (count agtype);
Integer (Range): SELECT * FROM cypher('$GRAPHNAME', $$ MATCH (n:TreeNode) WHERE n.string_id STARTS WITH '$rootID' RETURN count(n) $$) as (count agtype);

VANILLA: SELECT * FROM cypher('$GRAPHNAME', $$ MATCH (leaf:TreeNode)-[:HAS_CHILD*1..]->(root:TreeNode {string_id: '$rootID'}) WHERE NOT EXISTS((leaf)<-[:HAS_CHILD]-()) RETURN count(leaf) $$) as (count agtype);
Integer (Range): SELECT * FROM cypher('$GRAPHNAME', $$ MATCH (n:TreeNode) WHERE n.string_id STARTS WITH '$rootID' AND n.height = 0 RETURN count(n) $$) as (count agtype);

VANILLA: SELECT * FROM cypher('$GRAPHNAME', $$ MATCH (n1 {string_id: '$id1'}), (n2 {string_id: '$id2'}) OPTIONAL MATCH (n1)-[:HAS_CHILD*0..]->(ca)<-[:HAS_CHILD*0..]-(n2) RETURN count(ca) > 0 $$) as (in_same_subtree agtype);
Integer (Range): SELECT * FROM cypher('$GRAPHNAME', $$ RETURN split('$id1', '\\.')[0] = split('$id2', '\\.')[0] AS same_subtree $$) as (sameSubtree agtype);

VANILLA: SELECT * FROM cypher('$GRAPHNAME', $$ MATCH (n1:TreeNode {string_id: '$id1'}), (n2:TreeNode {string_id: '$id2'}) MATCH p1=(n1)-[:HAS_CHILD*0..]->(lca) MATCH p2=(n2)-[:HAS_CHILD*0..]->(lca) RETURN lca ORDER BY length(p1) ASC LIMIT 1 $$) as (lca agtype);
Integer (Range): SELECT * FROM cypher('$GRAPHNAME', $$ MATCH (lca:TreeNode) WHERE ('$id1' = lca.string_id OR '$id1' STARTS WITH (lca.string_id + '.')) AND ('$id2' = lca.string_id OR '$id2' STARTS WITH (lca.string_id + '.')) RETURN lca ORDER BY size(lca.string_id) DESC LIMIT 1 $$) as (lca agtype);

VANILLA: SELECT * FROM cypher('$GRAPHNAME', $$ MATCH (node:TreeNode {string_id: '$nodeID'}) MATCH (node)-[:HAS_CHILD*1..]->(ancestor:TreeNode) RETURN ancestor $$) as (ancestor agtype);
Integer (Range): SELECT * FROM cypher('$GRAPHNAME', $$ MATCH (target:TreeNode {string_id: '$nodeID'}) MATCH (ancestor:TreeNode) WHERE ancestor.string_id < target.string_id AND target.string_id STARTS WITH (ancestor.string_id + '.') RETURN ancestor $$) as (ancestor agtype);

Description: Check if one node is the ancestor of another
VANILLA: SELECT * FROM cypher('$GRAPHNAME', $$ MATCH (node1:TreeNode {string_id: '$id1'}) MATCH (node2:TreeNode {string_id: '$id2'}) RETURN EXISTS((node1)-[:HAS_CHILD*1..]->(node2)) OR EXISTS((node2)-[:HAS_CHILD*1..]->(node1)) AS isAncestorRelationship $$) as (isAncestorRelationship agtype);
Integer (Range): SELECT * FROM cypher('$GRAPHNAME', $$ RETURN ('$id1' CONTAINS '$id2') OR ('$id2' CONTAINS '$id1')  AS isAncestorRelationship $$) as (isAncestorRelationship agtype);
